name: Corn Dogs
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the cornmeal with 1/3 cup of water.
2. Add the egg, milk, and vegetable oil to the cornmeal mixture.
3. Dip each hot dog on a stick into the flour.
4. Coat the hot dogs thoroughly in the cornmeal mixture.
5. Heat the vegetable oil in a deep fryer or heavy pot to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
6. Carefully lower the coated hot dogs into the hot oil using tongs.
7. Fry until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes.
8. Remove the hot dogs with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
9. Serve immediately.
